tagline: AI-powered test gate for every commit
purpose: Intelligent test orchestration, code quality gating, and CI/CD intelligence layer for every product in the stack

crontech.purpose: Block or allow deployments based on test outcomes

gluecron.purpose: PR quality gate — AI diagnosis posted as PR comment

alecrae.purpose: Site deploy gating and build status badges

deployment.deploy_target: any VPS, bare metal, or cloud

competitive_position: The test intelligence layer that replaces dumb CI runners with AI that learns your codebase — every failure makes the next diagnosis sharper
